descriptionShort: Jim Hughson's second-part induction speech at the 2025 Richmond Sockeyes Hall of Fame ceremony.
descriptionLong: This is the second part of Jim Hughson's induction speech delivered at the 2025 Richmond Sockeyes BC Hockey Hall of Fame reunion event on July 13. Hughson, a notable hockey personality connected to the 1987 Centennial Cup-winning team, shares memories and reflections during the formal HOF induction ceremony.
